title: Abandoned Greenhouse
description: This is part 1 of a Minecraft Mod series I am making: Crafty Caves! The Abandoned Greenhouse is a structure found in Lush Caves, and between the time it was made and now the nature took over these ruins, and the machines that reside in it...
body:
# This is part 1 of a Minecraft Mod series I am making: Crafty Caves! 
The Abandoned Greenhouse is a structure found in Lush Caves, and between the time it was made and now the nature took over these ruins, and the machines that reside in it...
The mod also needs GeckoLib to work

**It's up to you, the player to Save the greenhouse from the Nature's Grasp, and free some of the residents from its prison, and figure out why this place has been left at the state it is now.**

![Watering Gardener Posing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb06b142432c91fce66acabb7041ba310418ac7e.png)

_NOTE: This is My first public mod, so the structure will generate as the same structure_
![Made using Mcreator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2aa811f032d7b1c45e991fa205869a86d55614cf.png)
